raw_consumer_statement:
I had ordered a XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX using my Citibank credit card with Best Buy on XX/XX/year> for {$530.00}. The order was then processed and shipped to my home, but it was never delivered even though it was sent to the correct address. Best Buy used a third party shipping service ( XXXX ) that has repeatedly in the past been reported for issues of nondeliveries as well as thefts. 

I made a call to their support team on XX/XX/XXXX so that I could get a replacement device to be picked up in-store this time, but the order was never fulfilled. I tried canceling the order online on XX/XX/XXXX, after which no refund was processed. 

I submitted a charge dispute with BestBuy/CitiBank XXXX XX/XX/XXXX including evidence that there was no authenticate attempt to make the delivery to the right address. The package was delivered to the wrong address as shown in their delivery photo. Unfortunately my claim was denied which is unacceptable.
